title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
narration: Secure your home by fastening heavy bookcases to walls and locking cabinet doors. Even minor retrofits dramatically reduce building collapse risks.
visual: 2D illustration of a hand securing a bookshelf bracket to a wall and placing latches on drawers.
